name: Caustics
description: Light through water, computed in closed form — no particles, no finite differences. Four directional plane waves play the water surface; a plane-wave sum has an analytic Hessian, so the ray-bundle focusing intensity I = shine/|det(I + depth·H)| is evaluated exactly per pixel in one JSON-editable kernel (edit the wave table to reshape the water). Fold lines and cusps go HDR-bright where the Jacobian genuinely collapses — the same physics as photon caustics, perfectly smooth and anti-aliased, one dispatch. Depth is the performance card: bind the sub-bass send and calm shimmer sharpens into violent folded ribbons. Extended Reinhard display with canvas-area-compensated intensity on pure black.

nodes.title: Analytic Caustics
